project.name: PA Restanță Study App
project.styling: Tailwind CSS 3 + custom CSS variables (dark theme, Outfit font)
project.purpose: Exam prep app for 'Proiectarea Algoritmilor' (Algorithm Design) restanță exam at FII UAIC. Covers KMP, Boyer-Moore, DP, Greedy, BKT, NP, randomized algorithms, regex, analysis.

codebase_layout.src/App.tsx: Root component — route setup, mode detection from path, ambient bg orbs
codebase_layout.src/index.css: 567 lines of CSS: design tokens, glass-panel, sim-cell, quiz-option, code-block, sidebar, topbar, progress-track, mode-pill, animated background (3 orbs + grid), scrollbar styling, animations
codebase_layout.src/types/index.ts: Type interfaces: AppMode, CodeExample, Topic, QuizQuestion, QuizSet, ExamProblem, PracticeExam, ProgressData
codebase_layout.src/lib/animations.ts: Framer-motion variants: pageVariants (page transitions), staggerContainer/Item (list reveals), fadeIn
codebase_layout.src/data/topics.ts: 10 Topic objects (~1180 lines) with rich markdown theory content, key points, code examples in ALK pseudocode
codebase_layout.src/data/quizzes.ts: Barrel — aggregates all quiz sets into QUIZZES record keyed by topic ID
codebase_layout.src/data/kmp-bm-quizzes.ts: KMP (5 levels) + BM (5 levels), ~30 questions each level
codebase_layout.src/data/quizSets.ts: BKT (5 levels) + Analiza (5 levels) + Nedet (5 levels) — ~5000 lines total across these quiz files
codebase_layout.src/data/exams/index.ts: Aggregates legacy + sesiuni + partiale + modele exams
codebase_layout.src/data/exams/sesiuni.ts: 8 session/restanta exams (2021-2024), full problem statements + hints + solutions in Romanian
codebase_layout.src/store/useAppStore.ts: Global UI state: mode, sidebarOpen, activeTopicId, activeExamId, activeProblemIndex
codebase_layout.src/store/useProgressStore.ts: Progress persistence via localStorage (completedTopics, passedQuizzes, solvedProblems as Sets)
codebase_layout.src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Hero with floating CS glyphs, stat chips (topics/quizzes/problems), 3 CTA cards, quick action buttons
codebase_layout.src/pages/LearnPage.tsx: 4-step learning flow: Theory → Code → Simulator → Quiz. Sidebar-based topic selection, step indicators, next-topic progression
codebase_layout.src/pages/PracticePage.tsx: Exam problem browser with hint reveal (progressive), solution toggle, solved mark, prev/next navigation, problem tabs
codebase_layout.src/pages/OverviewPage.tsx: SVG radial gauge, stat rows, 'continue where you left off' card, topic grid with status badges, exam progress bars, readiness assessment
codebase_layout.src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx: Animated collapsible sidebar with 3 variants (LearnSidebar: topic list with completion dots, PracticeSidebar: exam accordion with problem sublist, OverviewSidebar: static info)
codebase_layout.src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx: Top bar with sidebar toggle, logo, mode navigation pill (animated bg), progress summary badges
codebase_layout.src/components/quiz/Quiz.tsx: Retake-based quiz: tracks wrong questions, only retakes those, shows explanation after each answer, progress bar, pass state with celebration screen
codebase_layout.src/components/simulators/KMPSimulator.t: Interactive KMP: editable text/pattern, computes failure table, step-by-step visualization with colored cells, auto-play controls, match/mismatch descriptions
codebase_layout.src/components/simulators/BMSimulator.ts: Interactive BM: editable text/pattern, last-occurrence table, step visualization comparing right-to-left, bad-char + good-suffix rules, shift amounts
codebase_layout.src/components/simulators/DPSimulator.ts: DP matrix path simulator: hardcoded 3x4 matrix, computes dp table step-by-step, side-by-side A and DP matrices, highlights max value, auto-play

data_flow.routing: HashRouter with 4 routes: / (LandingPage), /learn (LearnPage), /practice (PracticePage), /overview (OverviewPage), catch-all redirects to /
data_flow.mode_detection: App.tsx watches location.pathname → sets mode in useAppStore ('learn'|'practice'|'overview')
data_flow.state_persistence: useProgressStore.init() called on mount → reads localStorage 'pa_progress'. All mutations auto-persist via persist() helper
data_flow.sidebar_content: Switches between LearnSidebar/PracticeSidebar/OverviewSidebar based on mode from useAppStore
data_flow.learning_flow: LearnPage reads activeTopicId from store → gets topic from TOPICS → renders step (theory/code/simulator/quiz). Quiz retake cycle: wrong questions re-queued until all correct → marks topic complete
data_flow.practice_flow: PracticePage reads activeExamId + activeProblemIndex → renders problem statement with progressive hints + solution toggle → mark solved
data_flow.overview_flow: OverviewPage reads all progress stores → computes percentages → renders radial gauge + per-topic/exam progress

LearnPage.SimulatorStep: Routes to KMPSimulator | BMSimulator | DPSimulator based on topicId

OverviewPage.Exam progress: per-exam progress bars with problem number pills

types_interfaces.Topic: { id, title, subtitle, icon, description (markdown), keyPoints (string[]), codeExamples (CodeExample[]), hasSimulator, simulatorType? }
types_interfaces.ExamProblem: { id, number, points, topic, statement, hints, solution }
types_interfaces.PracticeExam: { id, year, title, totalPoints, problems: ExamProblem[] }
types_interfaces.ProgressData: { completedTopics, passedQuizzes, solvedProblems } — serialized to JSON

key_functions_and_flows.markdownToHtml: Custom minimal markdown renderer (LearnPage + PracticePage) — supports ## h2, ### h3, **bold**, `code`, ```code blocks```, |tables|, * lists, numbered lists, --- hr. Two slightly different versions exist (PracticePage has extra table header skip and ordered list support)
key_functions_and_flows.Quiz retake logic (Quiz.tsx): Tracks wrong questions in wrongInRound Set. When round completes: if wrongInRound is empty → pass. Else → nextRound = [...wrongInRound] → only retake those. Repeats until all correct or pass.
key_functions_and_flows.KMPSimulator.computeSteps: Simulates KMP search step-by-step, recording i, k, textPos, isMatch, isFound, description. Uses computeFailure for prefix function. Safety cap at 500 steps.
key_functions_and_flows.BMSimulator.computeSteps: Simulates BM search step-by-step, recording alignStart, compareK, mismatchAt, rule (bad-char|good-suffix|match|found), shift, description. Uses lastOccurrence table. Simplified good suffix (just shift 1). Safety cap at 200 steps.
key_functions_and_flows.DPSimulator.computeDPLongestPath: DP matrix longest increasing path DP computation step-by-step. Hardcoded 3x4 matrix. Records row, col, value, fromAbove, fromLeft, description. Builds partial DP table for visualization.
key_functions_and_flows.LearnPage step progression: Step tabs filter out 'simulator' if !topic.hasSimulator. Footer nav has 'next step' button + 'next topic' button (shown only if quiz passed). Step dots indicator.
key_functions_and_flows.PracticePage problem reset: When problemKey changes (new exam/problem), resets showHints, showSolution, hintIndex to 0.

implemented: 10 comprehensive theory topics with markdown content, key points, and ALK code examples
460+ quiz questions across 10 topics, each with 5 difficulty levels (Începător, Ușor, Mediu, Avansat, Expert)
Quiz retake system — only wrong questions re-asked, spiral until all correct
3 interactive simulators: KMP (failure table + search visualization), BM (bad-char table + step visualization), DP (matrix path table building)
25+ real exam problems from session/restanță 2021-2024, partial exams 2015-2019, and model exams — with full statements, progressive hints, and solutions
Progress tracking with localStorage persistence (topics completed, quizzes passed, problems solved)
Overview dashboard with SVG radial gauge, per-topic/exam progress bars, readiness assessment with contextual messages
Animated background (3 drifting orbs + moving grid), glass-panel UI, smooth page transitions
Collapsible sidebar with context-aware content (topic list / exam accordion / overview)
Top bar with mode navigation pill (animated background pill indicator)
Landing page with floating CS glyphs, stat chips, CTA cards
Responsive layout with scrollable content areas
Dark theme with amber/emerald/cyan/violet accent colors
nice_to_haves_not_implemented: Backend/server — fully static SPA, no auth, no sync across devices
User accounts or multi-device progress sync
Practice mode: timed mock exams with automatic scoring
Question bank browser / search across all quiz questions
More simulators: Greedy (activity selection), BKT (N-queens), Rabin-Karp (rolling hash visualizer)
Dark/light theme toggle (only dark mode exists)
Analytics — which questions users get wrong most often
Animated algorithm visualizations for more topics (greedy exchange argument, BKT tree, NFA simulation for regex)
Comparison tool: side-by-side KMP vs BM vs RK on same input

conventions.language: Romanian for all UI text, questions, explanations
conventions.data_pattern: Topics use markdown descriptions, quizzes use QuizSet[] with difficulty levels
conventions.code_comments: None in component/data files (except attribution comments in exam data)
conventions.styling: Tailwind utility classes + custom CSS variables (--color-*) + custom component classes (.glass-panel, .sim-cell, .quiz-option, .code-block, .sidebar-item, .topbar)
conventions.routing: HashRouter (for static deployment on Vercel — works without server config)
conventions.state: Zustand stores for global state, no prop drilling beyond 1 level

design_system.css_variables: Defined in :root in index.css — dark base #0f0f11, surface levels (4%/7%/10% white), border levels (9%/14% white), accent colors (amber/emerald/rose/cyan/violet/orange), text opacity levels (92%/50%/32%)

components_classes.glass-panel: Rounded-xl with surface bg + border, used for cards and containers
components_classes.sim-cell: 32-42px square cells for algorithm visualization, with variants: --header, --active (amber bg), --match (emerald), --mismatch (rose), --dp-filled (cyan)
components_classes.quiz-option: Flex row with letter badge, hover state, variants: --correct (emerald), --wrong (rose), --disabled
components_classes.code-block: Pre/code with mono font, dark bg, cyan accent header
components_classes.sidebar-item: Flex row with icon + text + status icon/dot, --active variant with amber accent
components_classes.mode-pill: Button group with animated background indicator (framer-motion layoutId)
components_classes.progress-track: 4px rounded track (surface-raised bg), progress-fill (amber gradient fill)
components_classes.stat-chip: Compact stat display for landing page
components_classes.prose-pa: 2/3 max-width prose container for theory content

design_system.animations: Framer-motion: pageVariants (fade+slide), staggerContainer/Item (0.06s stagger), AnimatePresence for exit animations. CSS: orb-drift (48s/38s/52s), grid-pan (25s linear)
